sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ رِيَاضَةٌ بَسِيطَةٌ تُفِيدُ الْقَلْبَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Hodanje je jednostavan sport koji mnogo koristi srcu.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a simple sport that benefits the heart a lot.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam u parku trideset minuta svakog jutra.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park for thirty minutes every morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالنَّشَاطِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da se osjećam energično i sretno.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me feel energetic and happy.
